discussion_comments.comment_body: Fixed in 7f98c6a. Added a separate `av_global_news_limit: 50` key to `DEFAULT_CONFIG` so Alpha Vantage continues to use its historical default of 50. The shared `global_news_limit: 10` key remains for yfinance only. Both are now independently configurable.

Thanks Gemini — that's a fair call-out. I noticed the same duplication  
while implementing this and deliberately matched the existing pattern 
 (deepseek/qwen/glm/xai/openrouter all have URLs in both cli/utils.py and
_PROVIDER_CONFIG). Consolidating the two would touch every provider, 
which felt out of scope for adding a single new one. Happy to open a
follow-up PR centralizing all base URLs into a single source of truth
(e.g., import the dict from openai_client.py into cli/utils.py) if
maintainers want it — let me know.

These defaults mirror the upstream `default_config.py` (lines 12-13) and `validators.py` (lines 10-16), which define the GPT-5 series as valid models. Changing them here would diverge from the main stock analysis config. If these should be updated, it would be better addressed as a separate upstream-wide change.
